Paper orders and position closes now strictly require a live Binance
price. If the API is unreachable, the order is rejected with 503
instead of silently using a stale database price.

commit.message:
Fix jazz section: restore green card borders, remove subtle separator lines

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: restore session.prepare() in execute_query for YDB parameter binding

Commit 8d9c5a1 removed prepare() to fix "Unknown name: $id" errors,
but commit 1d3ea54 added DECLARE blocks to all queries. Without
prepare(), DECLARE blocks are not parsed and YDB cannot bind parameters
→ "Missing value for parameter: $lim" on /api/v1/mics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: comprehensive Telegram bot reliability audit

Root causes of "typing then no reply" identified and fixed:

1. **Telegram 4096 char limit** — long AI responses were silently rejected
   by Telegram (both Markdown and plain text retries failed). Now truncates
   to 4096 chars with "… (response truncated)" suffix.

2. **Orphaned tool messages in history** — when LIMIT 30 truncated
   conversation history, tool messages could appear without their preceding
   assistant message with tool_calls. OpenAI API rejects this invalid
   sequence. Now skips orphaned tool messages.

3. **Empty text guard** — empty/whitespace-only text replaced with
   "(empty response)" instead of failing silently.

4. **Top-level exception handler** — _handle_text_message is now wrapped in
   a catch-all so the user ALWAYS gets some reply.

Additional robustness fixes:
- execute_tool now includes actual error type/message in tool results
  (was generic "please try again" which masked root causes)
- sales_summary/purchases_summary: defensive fetchone() null check
- operations_overview: defensive fetchone() null check via _count() helper
- _json_safe: handle UUID type properly
- _rows: handle None input
- build_openai_tools_array: fix empty list vs None check

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(desktop): Add /api/ledger/* route to Desktop server

BUG: WINDI DOC auto-save wasn't registering documents in Ledger
because /api/ledger/receipts route didn't exist in Desktop server.

FIX: Added LEDGER_API constant (:8101) and routes:
- POST /api/ledger/receipts → Register receipt in Forensic Ledger
- GET /api/ledger/receipts → Query receipts

Now documents saved in WINDI DOC are properly sealed with valid
receipt IDs that can be verified.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Revert Rightmove to OUTCODE search for GU9 + GU10 only

User wants only GU9/GU10 listings, not the broader Farnham REGION which
includes surrounding postcodes. Searches both OUTCODE^1042 (GU9) and
OUTCODE^1043 (GU10) sequentially.

Make conda upload tolerant of prefix.dev 500 errors

commit.message:
Always build request_meta for all providers, even pending ones

When a provider is skipped (already pending), its metadata was also
skipped, so --batch-collect couldn't map results back to files.
Now metadata is built for all requests; only API submission is skipped
for pending providers.

commit.message:
Persist consolidation queue in Redis with reliable dequeue pattern

Moves the in-memory consolidation queue to Redis lists so jobs survive
server restarts. Uses LMOVE for atomic dequeue with crash recovery.
Conversation transcripts are fetched from D6 at processing time instead
of being stored in the queue. Also fixes the ltree path format in tool
descriptions (was missing week segment) and adds resolvedPaths to
retrieval output for multi-path visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(producer): per-provider CompetitionOdds enrichment (#152)

* feat(producer): enrich CompetitionOdds per-provider with game results

Previously, contest enrichment picked a single odds provider (EspnBet or
DraftKings) and only computed spread/O-U results for that one provider.
This is incorrect when ESPN returns odds from multiple bookmakers — each
provider's lines produce different results.

Changes:
- Add WinnerFranchiseSeasonId, AtsWinnerFranchiseSeasonId,
  OverUnderResult, and EnrichedUtc to CompetitionOdds entity
- Add indexes on WinnerFranchiseSeasonId and AtsWinnerFranchiseSeasonId
- Update ContestEnrichmentProcessor to load all odds providers (not just
  EspnBet/DraftKings) and compute results for each
- Extract EnrichOddsResults method that iterates all CompetitionOdds rows
- Contest-level denormalized fields still populated from primary provider
  (EspnBet preferred, any enriched provider as fallback)
- EF migration: 10MarV1_CompetitionOddsEnrichment

This enables future pick league scoring against any bookmaker's lines
and model evaluation across different odds providers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test(producer): add unit tests for ContestEnrichmentProcessor

12 tests covering:
- GetOverUnderResult: over, under, push scenarios
- GetSpreadWinnerFranchiseSeasonId: home covers, away covers, push,
  away-favored scenarios
- EnrichOddsResults: per-provider winner, different ATS results across
  providers, different O/U results across providers, tie game, missing
  spread/O-U lines

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: change enrichment helper methods to internal visibility

Mark EnrichOddsResults, GetOverUnderResult, and
GetSpreadWinnerFranchiseSeasonId as internal instead of public.
Add InternalsVisibleTo for test assembly.

Intentionally keeping Guid.Empty for ATS push results — null represents
"no spread data / not enriched", Guid.Empty represents "push" (neither
team covered). This three-state distinction is by design.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: reset enrichment fields before recomputing to prevent stale results

Clear WinnerFranchiseSeasonId, AtsWinnerFranchiseSeasonId, and
OverUnderResult at the start of each iteration so reruns (e.g., score
corrections) don't retain values from a previous enrichment pass.

Note: D2 empty-plays path intentionally does not enrich odds — these
games rarely have bookmaker odds and the audience is very niche.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add shot type classification (wide, medium, close-up, etc.)

con meses de gracia, explicando el motivo del ×1.5.

commit.message:
Switch Rightmove from OUTCODE to REGION search for full Farnham coverage

OUTCODE^1042 (GU9) only returns 88 results while REGION^506 (Farnham)
returns 521. Many Farnham properties are listed under surrounding
postcodes or the broader town region. Using REGION^506 captures all
listings in the Farnham area regardless of postcode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Revert plugin icon: System.Resources.Extensions crashes Trados

The non-string resource in PluginResources.resx required
System.Resources.Extensions for SDK-style .csproj, which
causes Trados Studio to crash on startup — likely a conflict
with how Trados's DefaultPluginTypeLoader reads .plugin.resources.

Reverts: icon PNG, .resx bitmap entry, GenerateResourceUse-
PreserializedResources property, System.Resources.Extensions
NuGet package, AppInitializer and package_plugin.py entries.

The Icon="TermLensIcon" attribute remains in ViewParts (harmless
when unresolved). A different approach is needed — e.g., embedding
via old-style .csproj resource compilation or code-based icon
loading.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: pause/resume recurring rules

Long-press a recurring rule to pause it. Paused rules stop generating
transactions; lastProcessed is set to yesterday so resuming picks up
from today. Cards show gray/muted styling and "Paused" label when
inactive. Sheet shows contextual ⏸/▶ action with hint text.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: safe vision stub (no false threats) and YDB execute_query binding

1. _stub_result() now returns has_felling=False — when VLM APIs are
   unavailable, the bot reports "no threat" instead of generating false
   chainsaw alerts for any photo.

2. execute_query() removes session.prepare() which broke parameter
   binding with DECLARE blocks, causing "Unknown name: $id" errors
   in create_incident().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Catch per-provider errors in batch_submit so partial success is saved

When OpenAI batch submission fails (e.g. auth error), the exception
previously bubbled up before save_batch_state was called, losing the
already-submitted Anthropic batch ID. Now each provider submission is
wrapped in try/except so partial results are returned and saved.

- Primer dividendo = 1.5× el normal solo cuando gracePeriodMonths > 0

repository.description: Know who changed what. Even when it's not human. Real-time code modification tracking with smart diffs, git attribution, and instant notifications.

commit.message:
feat(analysis): IVIVE calibration deep-dive — uniform factor doesn't work

ML-engineer findings:
- Factor sweep (1x-2000x): Cmax AAFE stays ~4.3 regardless
- With known in-vivo CL: Cmax AAFE 2.52, AUC AAFE 1.98 (both pass <3.0)
- Root cause: ADMET-AI hepatocyte CLint compressed to 2-75 range,
  /5480 conversion destroys signal
- Path forward: direct in-vivo CL prediction via XGBoost + PK-DB data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Skip already-pending providers on batch resubmit instead of erroring

When re-running --batch after a partial failure (e.g. Anthropic
succeeded but OpenAI auth failed), skip providers with existing
pending batches and only submit the missing ones. Merges new batch
IDs and metadata into existing state.

but content was empty. The anchor only stored hashes, not actual content.

FIX: After anchoring, also call /page/generate to persist the full
document content in W-PAGE-001. This ensures the viewer can retrieve
and display the document.

Applied to both:
- New seal flow (Merkle root)
- Legacy fallback flow

commit.message:
fix: add missing logger in decision.py and granular error handling in drone pipeline

NameError on logger.exception() in _call_yandex() was crashing the entire
drone photo pipeline. Each pipeline step (send_pending, compose_alert,
send_confirmed) now has its own try/except so the user always gets a
classification result even when downstream services fail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

  para usar endpoints correctos (/materiales/ingreso)
- Equipos: formulario de creación con campos código, nombre, tipo,
  marca, modelo
- Usuarios: nueva página completa con listado, filtros, creación
  y eliminación
- Actualizar App.tsx para incluir ruta /usuarios

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Prevent duplicate batch submissions when batch is already in progress

Re-running --batch would submit a second batch since result files
don't exist yet (they're only written on --batch-collect). Now checks
batch_state.json first and errors with a clear message.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix control panel applet loading and child process resources

Two fixes:
1. CPL path: strip directory prefix from CPL name before passing to
   LoadArmDll (e.g. "\Windows\cplmain.cpl" -> "cplmain.cpl")
2. Child process resources: add per-thread exe_path to ThreadContext
   so GetNativeModuleForResources loads resources from the child's PE
   instead of the parent's. Fixes missing menu bar when control.exe
   is launched from explorer's Start menu.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.description: Run Windows CE applications on desktop Windows

commit.message:
Claude/fix mobile layout xw qz x (#6)

* fix: use self-hosted Bootstrap and Swiper instead of CDN across all pages

The previous commit added vendor files locally but never updated the HTML
files to reference them. When the jsdelivr CDN is slow or blocked, Bootstrap
CSS/JS fails to load, breaking the mobile navbar collapse (hamburger menu)
and showing nav links as a plain bulleted list.

Updated all 51+ HTML files to use local assets/vendor/ paths with correct
relative prefixes for root, subdirectory, and VDP page depths.

https://claude.ai/code/session_018u7E3Z65gXm4a5jo7CQCZZ

* fix: use absolute paths for all assets to prevent broken nav/layout

Relative paths (./assets, ../assets, ../../assets) resolve incorrectly
when Netlify serves pages with pretty URLs (trailing slash), causing
Bootstrap CSS/JS to fail to load — breaking the navbar, header, and
all styling on every page except the homepage.

Changes:
- Convert all relative asset paths to absolute (/) in 62+ HTML files
- Update generate-vdp.js, generate-category-pages.js, generate-form-pages.js
  ASSET_PREFIX from relative to '/'
- Replace remaining CDN Bootstrap references with self-hosted vendor files
- Remove stale cdn.jsdelivr.net preconnect hints
- Rebuild all generated pages (VDP, category, form, homepage, inventory)

https://claude.ai/code/session_018u7E3Z65gXm4a5jo7CQCZZ

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update Next.js 16.0.4 → 16.1.6 (fix CVE-2025-66478)

commit.message:
fix: prevent silent Telegram message failures

- Never send empty text to Telegram (fall back to "No response generated.")
- Sanitize content: null → "" in assistant messages with tool_calls
- Don't send empty tools array to API (some providers reject it)
- Fix streaming path also setting content: None
- Log when Telegram send fails after all retries

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Docker auth flow: upgrade Chromium, anti-fingerprinting, browser lock

The auth flow (login → 2FA → trust device) was failing inside Docker
containers because alarm.com's bot detection flagged the headless browser.
Root causes and fixes:

- Upgrade Playwright from 1.49.1 (Chromium 131) to >=1.52 (Chromium 145)
  to match the current browser version — a year-old Chrome was suspicious
- Dynamically detect Chromium version for user agent instead of hardcoding
- Comprehensive anti-fingerprinting: spoof WebGL renderer (hide SwiftShader),
  fix outerWidth/outerHeight, screen props, fully delete navigator.webdriver
- Set timezone_id on browser context (container defaults to UTC)
- Serialize auth operations with asyncio.Lock — login(), solve_challenge(),
  and resend_2fa_code() now hold the lock during page operations
- Debug endpoints skip page access when lock is held to avoid destroying
  execution contexts during navigation
- Health monitor respects lock and auth state
- Detect stale 2FA state when alarm.com expires the session
- Add fingerprint diagnostic logging on startup
- Add video player Retry button handler

Bumps version to 0.1.13.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: retry Telegram message as plain text when Markdown parsing fails

When the AI response contains unmatched Markdown characters (_, *, etc.),
Telegram rejects the message with HTTP 400. The _send_message helper was
silently swallowing this error, causing the bot to show "typing" then
send nothing. Now retries without parse_mode on failure.

fix(grove): accept HTTP 201 for Ledger registration

Bug: Ledger returns 201 (Created) but code checked for 200 only.
Result: ledger_registered always false despite successful seal.

Fix: Accept both 200 and 201 as success codes.

Also adds:
- doc_type="doc" (ledger validates this)
- content_hash field (required)
- sge_score=0.8 (required)
- Better error logging to stderr

commit.message:
fix: getDueDates starts from lastProcessed, fix Feb-29 yearly drift

Start generating dates from lastProcessed (advance once past it) instead
of iterating all history and filtering. Use origDay/origMonth from
startDate for monthly/yearly clamping so Feb-29 yearly rules correctly
return Feb-28 on non-leap years and snap back to Feb-29 on leap years.

commit.message:
Include node_ids and prompt_variants in archive reset defaults check

These fields have empty-list defaults but were missing from
CONFIG_DEFAULTS, so archive would report "Config already at defaults"
even when they were populated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: ensure message content is always a string in conversation history

_load_history() was setting content to None for assistant messages with
tool_calls, causing OpenAI API to reject with HTTP 400 "expected a string,
got null". Now always uses empty string instead of None.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: fix ruff lint errors in scripts/ (unused vars, imports, noqa)

commit.message:
feat(SQ-44): include payment methods in invoice email

- Add payment_methods query in send endpoint (max 3, prioritize defaults)
- Add PaymentMethodForEmail type to email-service
- Add "Información de Pago" section to HTML email template
- Add payment section to plain text email fallback
- Use monospace font for values (copy-friendly)
- HTML escape for XSS prevention

Acceptance Criteria:
- ✅ AC1: Payment methods visible in "Información de Pago" section
- ✅ AC2: Bank transfer: Label + values formatted correctly
- ✅ AC3: PayPal email visible
- ✅ AC4: Copy-friendly format (monospace)

Story: SQ-44

commit.message:
Fix ListView icon arrangement: remove LVS_ALIGNLEFT forcing

LVS_ALIGNLEFT was being forced on all SysListView32 windows, causing
icons to arrange top-to-bottom in columns instead of left-to-right in
rows. The sort was working correctly but the visual layout read wrong.
